description_long: This hammer features a robust, dark gray metallic head with a broad, slightly curved striking face, ideal for heavy-duty tasks. The handle is elongated and appears to be reinforced with a textured, ribbed grip section, likely made from a composite or fiberglass material, and is colored in a deep red with black accents. The connection between the head and handle is seamless, suggesting a durable, integrated construction. The rear of the handle has a unique, open triangular structure, possibly for hanging or attaching a lanyard. The overall design is modern and ergonomic, with a focus on both functionality and comfort. No visible branding, wear, or additional attachments are present, giving the hammer a clean, new appearance.
description: A modern hammer with a broad gray metal head and a long, ribbed red-and-black handle featuring an open triangular end. The design is ergonomic and appears new, with no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, curved striking face of the hammer head and the ribbed handle extending downward, with the open triangular end visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated handle and the thickness of the hammer head, showing the full profile of the striking face and the open triangular structure at the handle's end.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hammer head and the handle, emphasizing the open triangular end and the seamless connection between head and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the handle's length, the head's profile, and the open triangular end from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight fiberglass handle with a ribbed, textured, and grippy rubberized section for enhanced grip; colored red and black with an open triangular end.
attribute_head_type: Broad, slightly curved steel striking face; no claw or peen, resembling a sledge or mallet style head.
